title: (Bullish Signal) BLNK, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling BLNK's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 42 similar cases where BLNK's MACD histogram became positive, and 40 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $50.84 is above $30.00 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/09/20 - 01/12/21, the price experienced a +92% Uptrend. During the week of 01/05/21 - 01/12/21, the stock enjoyed a +29% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/ukrnfin1u5b61.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=de1d79cc44e818496e1f9003702a163ef90073ba

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 52 of 60 cases where BLNK's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on January 08, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BLNK as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 79 of 92 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

BLNK moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 03, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for BLNK crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 06, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 17 of 20 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

Following a +19.13% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BLNK advanced for three days, in 186 of 222 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 114 of 137 cases where BLNK Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 83%.
